title: Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Karlsruhe is a city in Baden-Württemberg with a population of 312,000. The fan-shaped city of law and technology, home to Germany’s highest court, a top technical university, and a pioneering AI research hub.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
